info.title: EagleRepair.Cli
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2022 Martin Odermatt
-r, --rules      Specify the set of rules to apply, e.g., R1 R2 R3. If no
argument is passed, all rules are applied.
-p, --path       (Default: .) Specify the full path to the solution (.sln)
file.
-v, --verbose    Set output to verbose messages.
-o, --output     Specify an output path for statistics.
--help           Display this help screen.
--version        Display version information.

options.name: --rules
options.description:
Specify the set of rules to apply, e.g., R1 R2 R3. If no
argument is passed, all rules are applied.

options.name: --path
options.description:
(Default: .) Specify the full path to the solution (.sln)
file.

options.name: --output
options.description: Specify an output path for statistics.
